policies.inbound:
<set-variable name="new-contracts-json" value="@((string)context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true))" />
        
            
                
                    
                    
                        application/json
                    
                    {"error":"Request body must contain contracts JSON."}
                
            
            
                
                    {contracts-blob-url}
                    PUT
                    
                        2020-04-08
                    
                    
                        BlockBlob
                    
                    
                        application/json
                    
                    @((string)context.Variables["new-contracts-json"])
                    
                

                
                    
                        
                        
                            
                            
                                application/json
                            
                            {"status":"ok","message":"Access contracts updated and cache cleared."}
                        
                    
                    
                        
                            
                            
                                application/json
                            
                            {"error":"Failed to update contracts blob. Verify APIM managed identity has Storage Blob Data Contributor on the contracts container."}
